channel.title: Morning Mail
channel.description: Stay updated on the latest news and events happening in the RPI community.

item.title: Summer Semester Break Dining Hours Of Operations
item.description:
Please note that dining locations on campus will operate on adjusted schedules for the Summer Semester Break starting on June 27th. Regular summer hours of operations will resume on July 6th. For the hours of operations please click the link above. Thank you and have a safe and enjoyable Summer Semester Break and July 4th!

For information about sharing your news or events, or to change your subscription settings, visit morningmail.rpi.edu.
item.author: Community
